structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-07-15 Pima County MCC Funds Available
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-07-15 10:53:50-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Help your first-time homebuyers unlock valuable savings with the Mortgage Credit Certificate (MCC) Program, available in Pima County. MCCs allow homeowners to claim up to $2,000 of their annual mortgage interest as a federal tax credit each year they live in their homes. MCCs can save homeowners $50,000+ over the life of their mortgage. 

Program Benefits: 

*	Helps homebuyers qualify for financing
*	Increases loan eligibility
*	Reduces borrower tax liability
*	Tax credit stays with the borrower, even if they refinance

Program Details: 

*	Borrowers must have a federal income tax liability to benefit from the MCC program. Borrowers with no tax liability will not receive a benefit and are not eligible for program participation. 
*	There is a $1,000 fee per certificate
*	Funding is limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis. 

 

For additional information, including income and purchase price limits, target areas, and how to apply, visit the CiC website <https://cictucson.org/mcc/> . 

Attachments:

*	Marketing flyers

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  

For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 

For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
